definition: MN 137's category of dynamic balance grounded in discernment of inconstancy and going beyond the object.
notes: Use this record for the renunciation-side dynamic-balance family in MN 137. Keep the renunciation tie explicit and keep the line connected to discernment of inconstancy, dissatisfaction, and change. Do not flatten it into detached calm.

example_phrases.translation: six dynamic balances tied to renunciation
example_phrases.notes: Category label in the thirty-six positions section of MN 137.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the renunciation-side dynamic-balance family in the six-fields analysis.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English label for the nekkhammasita upekkhā category in MN 137 unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the category into generic equanimity or detached calm language that loses the renunciation-side distinction.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the MN 137 category from drifting into generic calm language or dropping the renunciation-side tie.
